response.justification: Solid full-stack engineering background with roughly 14 years of professional experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but the resume does not demonstrate the director-level technical leadership, recognized AI expertise, or large-scale cloud/AI platform strategy work the Principal Engineer role requires.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic developer tooling
Track record of teaching, talks, and open-source product ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: No evidence of director-level IC scope or strategic advisory work
Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise or AI products at platform scale
No cloud platform strategy or large-org entrepreneurial signals

key_factors.factor: Emerging AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
